name: Chautauqua Home Rehabilitation And Improvement Corp. (Chric)
description_short: HUD-approved housing counseling agency in Mayville, NY offering free financial guidance, homebuyer education, and housing rehabilitation assistance to low-income residents.
description_long:
Chautauqua Home Rehabilitation And Improvement Corp. (CHRIC) is a HUD-approved housing counseling agency based in Mayville, New York, located at 2 Academy Street in Chautauqua County. The organization serves low-income residents seeking affordable housing solutions and financial stability in the region, with a median local household income of $47,773. CHRIC operates as a non-profit provider of comprehensive housing and financial counseling services to eligible community members.

CHRIC offers a full spectrum of HUD-approved housing counseling services including pre-purchase homebuyer education workshops, financial management and budget counseling, home improvement and rehabilitation counseling, and predatory lending education. They provide mortgage delinquency and default resolution counseling for homeowners facing payment difficulties, along with non-delinquency post-purchase workshops. The agency also conducts fair housing pre-purchase education workshops to ensure consumers understand their rights and responsibilities in the housing market. Services are delivered in both English and Spanish to serve the diverse local population.

What distinguishes CHRIC is its dual focus on both prospective homebuyers and existing homeowners facing financial or housing challenges. Unlike purely transactional lenders, CHRIC provides education-based counseling to help consumers make informed decisions and avoid predatory lending practices. Their HUD approval ensures services meet federal standards for quality and consumer protection. The organization addresses the full housing lifecycle—from pre-purchase education through post-purchase financial management and rehabilitation guidance.

CHRIC is best suited for low-income individuals and families seeking free, non-commercial guidance on housing and finances rather than loans or credit products. The primary limitation is that they do not provide direct financial assistance or loans; they offer counseling and education only. Additionally, as a regional agency serving Chautauqua County, their services are geographically limited. Prospective clients should contact them directly at 716-753-4650 to confirm eligibility and service availability.
pros: HUD-approved agency ensuring federally-compliant counseling standards and consumer protections
Completely free services with no loan products or commercial fees
Bilingual services in English and Spanish for diverse community access
Comprehensive pre-purchase homebuyer education and fair housing workshops
Specialized predatory lending education to protect vulnerable consumers
Mortgage delinquency and default resolution counseling for homeowners in crisis
Home improvement and rehabilitation counseling focused on property maintenance
cons: Geographic limitation to Chautauqua County, NY region only
Does not provide direct financial assistance, loans, or grants—counseling only
Limited public information available about wait times, appointment availability, or service hours
No clear documentation of their low-income apartment inventory or rental rates on their main profile
best_for: First-time homebuyers in Chautauqua County seeking free pre-purchase education and fair housing guidance
Low-income homeowners facing mortgage delinquency, default, or financial hardship
Consumers vulnerable to predatory lending seeking education and protective counseling
Spanish-speaking residents needing bilingual financial and housing guidance
diagnosis: CHRIC is ideal for low-income Chautauqua County residents seeking free, non-profit housing counseling and financial education—particularly first-time homebuyers, homeowners in financial distress, or those at risk of predatory lending. The main caveat is that they provide counseling and education only, not direct loans, grants, or financial assistance, and their services are limited to the Mayville/Chautauqua region.
services: Mortgage Delinquency and Default Resolution Counseling
Bilingual services in English and Spanish
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
